name: brand-review
description: Review content against your brand voice, style guide, and messaging pillars, flagging deviations by severity with specific before/after fixes. Use when checking a draft before it ships, when auditing copy for voice consistency and terminology, or when screening for unsubstantiated claims, missing disclaimers, and other legal flags.

inputs.name: content
inputs.description: The draft to review (read from 01-draft.md, a file, a URL, or pasted)

inputs.name: brand-guidelines
inputs.description: Brand voice / style guide (read from the project context.md or pasted); falls back to a generic clarity/consistency/professionalism review

outputs.name: review
outputs.description: Summary + findings table (issue/location/severity/suggestion) + before/after revisions + legal/compliance flags
